# Staff Software Engineer - AI Platform Team - Coinbase
...
AI Platform builds and operates the LLM and agent infrastructure every team at Coinbase builds on, and ships high impact AI agents on top of it. We are the company's single path to LLMs and the substrate for the full agent lifecycle: build, deploy, run, observe, improve.

## What you'll do:
...
- LLM Gateway: one API for 60+ models across all major providers, including self hosted open weight models, with auth, PII redaction, quotas, fallbacks, and cost optimization
- AI Hub: single front door for agents, skills, MCP servers, knowledge bases, models, memories, and keys
- Agent and MCP runtime: microVM sandboxes per agent run, a governed MCP gateway over 125+ servers, cross trust agent identity, tier 1 agents for code, analytics, and exec personas
- Knowledge Bases: connect any data source, auto provision vector and markdown stores, queryable by any agent over MCP
- AI Spend Hub: FinOps for AI, spend attribution and governance across the company
- Evaluation and observability: in house LLM as judge harness with full tracing and eval tooling
- Company wide chat and low code workflow surfaces, thousands of weekly actives each
- Applied AI: we embed with teams to build production agents, build the feedback loops that let subject matter experts refine them, and apply traditional ML including fine tuning where it beats prompting
- Utilizes and builds generative AI responsibly, maintaining human oversight to deliver business-ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in workflow efficiency, cost, and quality
...

...
Own multi quarter, high impact initiatives on the platform (gateway, runtime, knowledge, governance) or the applied agents on top. Partner across engineering, security, legal, finance, and product, and work directly with our partners at the frontier labs and major cloud providers.

# Staff Machine Learning Engineer (Platform - Identity) - Coinbase
...
## Staff Machine Learning Engineer, Identity Verification
...
As a Staff Machine Learning Engineer on the Identity Verification team within the Platform group, you'll own the ML systems that determine whether a person, document, and capture session are legitimate. Every signup, account recovery, and high-risk action at Coinbase depends on these models. You'll lead the technical strategy for IDV ML end-to-end, from architecture through production enforcement, protecting the integrity of millions of accounts.
...
What you'll do:
...
- Own the full IDV ML stack, including document authenticity models, 1:1 and 1:N face-match, liveness detection, presentation-attack detection, and deepfake/injection detection from feature pipeline through threshold tuning and production enforcement.
...
- Build identity-graph systems using GNNs that cluster accounts sharing biometric, device, and document signals to detect synthetic-identity rings and coordinated fraud at onboarding.
...
- Develop behavioral and device-intelligence models for capture-session anomaly detection, bot-vs-human classification, and device-fingerprint-based risk scoring at real-time latency.
...
- Drive vendor ML strategy by benchmarking external models against a Coinbase-owned evaluation set, designing dynamic routing logic across providers and geographies, and building the in-house evaluation layer that catches regressions before they reach users.
...
- Lead and mentor senior and mid-level engineers in the pod while partnering with ML Platform and Risk ML teams to align cross-company ML system design.
...
Required Skills and Experience:
...
- 8+ years deploying production ML systems at scale, with proven technical leadership owning cross-team ML architecture from design through production.
- Domain experience in identity verification, biometrics, or account integrity with deep applied ML in at least two of: computer vision/biometrics, GNNs, sequence models, or NLP/LLMs.
...
- Expert-level Python with production experience in TensorFlow or PyTorch, including model training, evaluation, and serving infrastructure.
...
- Track record translating KYC/AML requirements and fraud trends into ML roadmaps and communicating trade-offs to Product, Compliance, Risk, and Security stakeholders.
...
- Utilizes generative AI responsibly, maintaining human oversight to deliver business-ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in workflow efficiency, cost, and quality.

highlights:
Coinbase MPC Tool for AI Agents: Secure Trading & Research | LLM News & AI Updates
...
Coinbase, the prominent cryptocurrency exchange, has announced the launch of a significant new tool designed to empower artificial intelligence(AI) agents. This innovative solution, built upon Multi-Party Computation (MPC) technology, promises to enable AI agents to securely execute trades and access premium market research, marking a pivotal step forward in the integration of AI within the financial sector.
...
The newly developed tool, internally referred to as 'mcp', leverages the x402 protocol to provide AI agents with secure access to both data and application programming interfaces (APIs). This functionality is crucial for agents that need to interact with external services, such as exchanges, to perform complex actions like placing orders, managing portfolios, or retrieving real-time market data.
...
Coinbase's mcp tool is poised to accelerate the development and deployment of sophisticated AI trading agents. These agents, powered by advanced algorithms and machine learning models, can analyze vast amounts of market data, identify trading opportunities, and execute trades with speed and precision that often surpass human capabilities.
...
With mcp, AI agents can now:
...
- Execute Trades Securely: Agents can initiate and manage trades on the Coinbase platform without directly handling private keys, thanks to the secure computation provided by MPC.
- Access Real-Time Data: The x402 protocol enables agents to fetch crucial market data, such as price feeds, order book information, and historical trends, in a secure and efficient manner.
- Integrate with APIs: This allows for seamless interaction with various financial services and data providers, expanding the capabilities of AI agents.
...
Beyond trading execution, Coinbase's mcp also aims to provide AI agents with access to premium research and analytics. This could include proprietary market insights, in-depth analysis reports, or advanced forecasting models that are typically behind paywalls or require specialized subscriptions.
...
By integrating these research capabilities, AI agents can become even more sophisticated. They can not only react to market movements but also proactively identify trends and opportunities based on high-quality, curated information. This synergy between secure trading infrastructure and valuable research data creates a powerful environment for AI-driven financial decision-making.
...
The introduction of mcp by Coinbase signifies a broader trend towards the increasing sophistication and adoption of AI in the financial industry. As AI agents become more capable and secure, their role in trading, portfolio management, risk assessment, and even financial advisory services is likely to expand significantly.
...
Coinbase's move is expected to spur further innovation in this area, potentially leading to the development of even more advanced tools and protocols for AI-powered financial applications. The company's commitment to providing secure and accessible infrastructure for AI agents could solidify its position as a leader in the evolving landscape of digital finance.
